payload.answer: Key fields to record for evaluation accounting: token_count (tokens used), provider_id and model_id (which service and model were used), estimated_price (cost projection for the run), and latency measurements (latency_p50, latency_p90, latency_p95) to capture performance. These enable traceability, cost estimation, and performance benchmarking across runs.
payload.decision: provide a concise, structured explanation of required evaluation accounting fields for token usage and latency metrics without asserting any specific values.

entity_resolution.reason: fields are generic accounting metadata; actual IDs resolved at runtime per evaluation run

memory_cards.statement: Required evaluation accounting fields include token counts, provider/model identifiers, estimated price, and latency statistics (p50, p90, p95). These fields enable cost estimation, performance benchmarking, and provenance tracking for each evaluation run.

details: No values committed; placeholders used for explanation
